About Me

Crafting stories
through visuals

I'm a graphic designer and social media manager who believes every brand deserves a visual identity as unique as its story. From product mood boards to editorial fashion shoots, I blend aesthetics with strategy.

My work spans luxury fragrance, Ayurvedic beauty, clean skincare, and fashion — creating visuals that feel elevated, intentional, and deeply on-brand.

What I Offer

Services

01 /
Graphic Design
Brand identity, visual storytelling, mood boards, and product creative for luxury and lifestyle brands.
02 /
Social Media Management
Full-service Instagram strategy — grid curation, carousels, reels covers, and consistent brand aesthetic.
03 /
Packaging Design
Label and packaging design from concept to production-ready — beauty, wellness, and lifestyle products.
04 /
Creative Direction
Mood board creation, art direction for product and fashion photography, editorial styling concepts.
